response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of polyglot experience, open-source contributions, Linux expertise, and a self-founded GIS platform demonstrating architectural ownership. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the resume lists only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German consultancy. Formal team-lead/management experience is also thin — mostly individual contributor and founder roles rather than leading interdisciplinary teams.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux background with a founded GIS platform (GISCollective) showing architectural ownership
Broad polyglot stack (TypeScript, Python-adjacent, DLang, C/C++, Java) and exposure to AI/MCP tooling
Proven mentoring/teaching track record via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 hard requirement for a German-market consulting lead
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal team-leadership tenure; mostly senior IC roles
UML/formal modeling and requirements-management expertise not demonstrated on the resume
